scenario_title: Refusal and disruption during classroom transition
minimal_context: The student is instructed to line up and be quiet while transitioning between classrooms.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please line up and be quiet for the transition.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Refuses to line up) We're going on strike!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to get in line right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sings loudly) Oakdale school, is not the best school for you. I hate Oakdale, I hate Oakdale.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please line up and be quiet for the transition.

STUDENT: (Continues talking instead of being quiet)

TUTOR: I still hear people talking!

STUDENT: (Refuses to line up) We're going on strike!

TUTOR: You need to get in line right now.

STUDENT: (Sings loudly) Oakdale school, is not the best school for you. I hate Oakdale, I hate Oakdale.
